description: A structured early-stage program for founders at idea, problem-validation, or prototype stage. Designed to help aspiring startups validate the problem, refine the solution, build an MVP, evaluate product-market-fit, pilot with initial customers and prepare for incubation readiness.
Comprehensive support for startups at idea, PoC, or MVP stage. Get access to dedicated workspace, labs, mentorship, and seed funding opportunities.
features: Highly skilled talent and technology patent pool
Access to research labs and high end equipment
